context: Evaluate whether the agent applies the conflicting-priorities fallback (lead with risk and decision deadline) to produce an executive briefing covering two simultaneous critical security issues.

checklist.name: Conflicting priorities fallback stated explicitly
checklist.description: Response writes the required prefix 'Multiple critical issues — leading with risk and deadlines.' before writing the document.

checklist.name: Both issues visible near the opening
checklist.description: Both the data breach and the security vulnerability appear prominently near the start — neither is buried after extensive background.

checklist.name: GDPR deadline calculated and surfaced
checklist.description: The remaining GDPR notification time (54 hours at time of writing) is calculated and prominently stated.

checklist.name: Technical terms translated and acronyms defined
checklist.description: CVE, PII, remote code execution, and supply chain vulnerability are explained in plain language with acronyms defined on first use.

checklist.name: Each issue has owner and deadline
checklist.description: Both issues name the responsible team using [Owner] must [action] by [deadline] format.
